title: Find Churn Risk Customers
metaData:
{"mysql": ["CREATE TABLE if not exists subscription_events (
    event_id INT,
    user_id INT,
    event_date DATE,
    event_type VARCHAR(20),
    plan_name VARCHAR(20),
    monthly_amount DECIMAL(10,2)
)"], "mssql": ["CREATE TABLE subscription_events (
    event_id INT,
    user_id INT,
    event_date DATE,
    event_type VARCHAR(20),
    plan_name VARCHAR(20),
    monthly_amount DECIMAL(10,2)
)"], "oraclesql": ["CREATE TABLE subscription_events (
    event_id NUMBER,
    user_id NUMBER,
    event_date DATE,
    event_type VARCHAR2(20),
    plan_name VARCHAR2(20),
    monthly_amount NUMBER(10,2)
)", "ALTER SESSION SET nls_date_format='YYYY-MM-DD'"], "database": true, "name": "find_churn_risk_customers", "postgresql": ["CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS subscription_events (
    event_id INT PRIMARY KEY,
    user_id INT NOT NULL,
    event_date DATE NOT NULL,
    event_type VARCHAR(20) NOT NULL,
    plan_name VARCHAR(20),
    monthly_amount NUMERIC(10,2) NOT NULL
);
"], "pythondata": ["subscription_events = pd.DataFrame({
    "event_id": pd.Series(dtype="int"),
    "user_id": pd.Series(dtype="int"),
    "event_date": pd.Series(dtype="datetime64[ns]"),  # corresponds to SQL DATE
    "event_type": pd.Series(dtype="string"),
    "plan_name": pd.Series(dtype="string"),           # can be NULL for cancel events
    "monthly_amount": pd.Series(dtype="float")        # corresponds to DECIMAL(10,2)
})"], "database_schema": {"subscription_events": {"event_id": "INT", "user_id": "INT", "event_date": "DATE", "event_type": "VARCHAR(20)", "plan_name": "VARCHAR(20)", "monthly_amount": "DECIMAL(10, 2)"}}}
